message:
test(conformance,e2e): add semantics conformance and cancellation stress suite

Refinement conformance (184 new lines):
- refinement_semantics_spawn_cancel_close_obligation: unit-level
  OracleSuite test exercising spawn → cancel → close → obligation
  lifecycle with all state transitions
- refinement_semantics_trace_golden: E2E deterministic lab trace with
  golden fingerprint assertion (seed 0x00C0FFEE)

Runtime E2E cancellation stress (408 new lines, bd-jj62v):
- e2e_cancellation_storm_with_chaos_replay: 80 tasks with chaos
  injection (35% cancel probability, random delays), replay recording
- e2e_timeout_cascade_with_replay: 3-level region hierarchy (root →
  child → grandchild) with timeout cancellation cascading through
  all levels, verifying CancelKind::Timeout propagation
- e2e_race_loser_cancellation_drain: winner/loser pattern verifying
  CancelKind::RaceLost attribution and loser drain invariant
- e2e_finalizer_heavy_cancel_workload: 24 sync + 24 async finalizers
  under shutdown cancel, verifying all run to completion

All tests include TestHarness with structured context, phase tracking,
and replay artifact collection on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
